name: reportMatch
_note: tournaments.reportMatch submits a result and auto-advances the bracket. Unknown id → 'tournament_not_found'; not in_progress → 'tournament_not_running'; unknown matchId → 'match_not_found'; already reported → 'match_already_reported'; a bye → 'match_is_bye'; equal scores → 'draws_not_allowed'. Scores are floored at 0 via num(); the higher score wins, the loser is marked eliminated in single-elim. Recomputes standings and may finalize. No CC is minted — completion triggers proportional payout COMPUTATION only.
